calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jul-31-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark W. Epstein, Esq. for the Defendants Daniel Macchiarini, Joan Mankin, and The Cellar, LLC. There were no appearances by Plaintiff.
The Matter is on calendar as regularly scheduled for Hearing on Defendants' Motion for Award of Attorneys' Fees.
No appearances by Plaintiff and no opposition papers were submitted. After the Court considering all moving papers submitted in support of Defendants' Motion, and hearing on the argument on the same, and that the matter having been submitted, Defendants' Motion is hereby granted for attorney's fees in the amount of $47,135.00 and costs in the amount of $3,469.19 for a total award of $50,604.19

Dept. 306 Judge Richard Ulmer, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha, Not reported. (306)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Continued To Jul-31-15 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 306
